---
title: "Chikv | Cellchat analysis"
author: "Giorgio Gonnella"
date: 2025-11-28
output:
  html_document:
    theme: sandstone
params:
  analysis: "1"
  input_step: "03.P.integration"
  input_rds: "integrated_so.rds"
  this_step: "07.P.compute_cellchat"
  output_rds: "so_w_cellchat.rds"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message=F, warning=F, echo=F)
withr::with_dir(here::here(), { source("renv/activate.R") })

library(Seurat)
library(CellChat)
library(future)

options(future.globals.maxSize = 10 * 1024^3)

analysis_root <- here::here(paste0("analysis-", params$analysis,"/"))

input_step_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$input_step, "/")
input_var_dir <- paste0(input_step_dir, "results/vars/")

if (!dir.exists(input_var_dir)) {
  stop("Input variable directory does not exist: ", input_var_dir)
}

this_step_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$this_step, "/")
if (!dir.exists(this_step_dir)) {
  stop("Current step directory does not exist: ", this_step_dir)
}

var_dir <- paste0(this_step_dir, "results/vars/")
if (!dir.exists(var_dir)) {
  dir.create(var_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}
```

```{r load, echo=F}
so <- readRDS(file = paste0(input_var_dir, params$input_rds))
Idents(so) <- "celltype.abbrev"
```

# Cell proportions permutations test

Perform a permutation test to assess the differences in cell type proportions.

```{r subset_so_by_timepoint, echo=TRUE}
so_A <- subset(so, TimePoint == "A")
so_6m <- subset(so, TimePoint == "6m")
so_A_NC <- subset(so_A, clinical_condition == "Non-Chronic")
so_6m_NC <- subset(so_6m, clinical_condition == "Non-Chronic")
so_A_C <- subset(so_A, clinical_condition == "Chronic")
so_6m_C <- subset(so_6m, clinical_condition == "Chronic")
```

```{r init_misc}
so@misc$cellchat <- list()
```

```{r cellchat_function}
run_cellchat <- function(so, group.by, ncores = 32) {
  cellchat <- createCellChat(object = GetAssayData(so, assay = "RNA",
                                                   slot = "data"),
                             meta   = so@meta.data,
                             group.by = group.by)
  cellchat@DB <- CellChatDB.human
  cellchat <- subsetData(cellchat)

  plan("multisession", workers = ncores)
  cellchat <- identifyOverExpressedGenes(cellchat)
  cellchat <- identifyOverExpressedInteractions(cellchat)
  cellchat <- smoothData(cellchat, adj = PPI.human)

  cellchat <- computeCommunProb(cellchat,
                                raw.use         = TRUE,
                                population.size = TRUE)
  cellchat <- filterCommunication(cellchat, min.cells = 10)
  cellchat <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat)
  cellchat <- aggregateNet(cellchat)
  cellchat <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat, slot.name = "netP")

  plan("sequential")
  return(cellchat)
}
```

## Acute

```{r A_NC_cellchat, echo=TRUE}
so@misc$cellchat["A_NC"] <- run_cellchat(so_A_NC, group.by = "celltype.abbrev")
```

## 6 months

```{r m6_NC_cellchat, echo=TRUE}
so@misc$cellchat["6m_NC"] <- run_cellchat(so_6m_NC, group.by = "celltype.abbrev")
```

## Non-Chronic

```{r A_C_cellchat, echo=TRUE}
so@misc$cellchat["A_C"] <- run_cellchat(so_A_C, group.by = "celltype.abbrev")
```

## Chronic

```{r m6_C_cellchat, echo=TRUE}
so@misc$cellchat["6m_C"] <- run_cellchat(so_6m_C, group.by = "celltype.abbrev")
```

## Saving data

```{r save, echo=TRUE}
saveRDS(so, paste0(var_dir, params$output_rds))
```

## Session info

```{r, echo=F}
sessionInfo()
```
